events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: heavy-industrial construction, Equipment safety, Sitework & Utilities, observed field condition: personnel in swing radius, work actively in progress. Reference OSHA 1926 Subpart O (cranes and derricks? Actually Subpart O is Motor Vehicles, Mechanized Equipment, and Marine Operations; includes excavators? Subpart O covers material handling, pile driving, etc. Swing radius hazard likely from excavator or crane. Personnel in swing radius is high severity, immediate controls: establish swing radius barricade, remove personnel, spotter, operator communication, use of tag lines, etc. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk critical? Personnel in swing radius can cause struck-by/caught-in, severe injury or death. Use critical. Work_stage in-progress. Component conditions maybe non-compliant (safety zone). Percent complete unknown, maybe 50? Value not asked, 0. Sound_source etc default empty/null? Schema types: sound_source string, event_time number, rate number, order list, workable list. Use defaults: sound_source "", event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order [], workable []. Findings: personnel within swing radius of operating equipment; no exclusion zone/barricade; struck-by hazard. Actions: stop work, clear all personnel from swing radius, establish barricade/exclusion zone, assign spotter, ensure operator visibility/communication, verify swing radius marked on drawings/ground, resume only after controls verified. Rationale. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart O, maybe 1926.601, 1926.602, 1926.1424 (if cranes Subpart CC). But reference says OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Use that. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.
